title: Software Developers
description: Research, design, and develop computer and network software or specialized utility programs.

tasks.name: Analyze user needs to determine software requirements
Design and write code for software programs
Test software and identify and correct errors
Consult with engineering staff to evaluate software-hardware interfaces
Modify existing software to correct errors and adapt to new hardware
Perform or direct software testing
Analyze information to determine, recommend, and plan the use of new technologies
Coordinate software system installation and monitor equipment functioning
Write documentation for software systems
Collaborate with team members in code reviews

title: Computer Systems Analysts
description: Analyze science, engineering, business, and other data processing problems to develop and implement solutions.

tasks.name: Analyze information processing or computation needs
Read manuals, periodicals, and technical reports to learn new technologies
Plan and prepare technical reports, memoranda, and instructional manuals
Confer with personnel to analyze current computer systems
Review and analyze computer printouts and performance indicators
Develop and implement system requirements
Document requirements and specifications
Coordinate and link computer systems within an organization

title: Computer and Information Research Scientists
description: Conduct research into fundamental computer and information science as theorists, designers, or inventors.

tasks.name: Assign or schedule tasks to meet work priorities and goals
Apply theoretical expertise and innovation to create or apply new technology
Design experiments, analyze and interpret data
Publish or present research findings
Collaborate with engineers to design, develop, and test solutions
Consult with users, management, and technical staff

title: Computer and Information Systems Managers
description: Plan, direct, or coordinate activities in such fields as electronic data processing, information systems, systems analysis, and computer programming.

tasks.name: Direct daily operations of the department, analyzing workflow and planning
Develop computer information resources, providing for data security and control
Develop and interpret organizational goals, policies, and procedures
Review project plans to plan and coordinate project activity
Recruit, hire, train, and supervise staff
Review and approve hardware and software acquisitions and maintenance contracts
Stay abreast of advances in technology
Prepare and review operational reports or project progress reports

title: Management Analysts
description: Conduct organizational studies and evaluations, design systems and procedures, conduct work simplifications and measurement studies.

tasks.name: Gather and organize information on problems or procedures
Analyze data gathered and develop solutions or alternative methods
Confer with personnel to analyze current computer systems
Document findings of study and prepare recommendations
Review forms and reports and confer with management
Develop and implement records management program
Interview personnel to obtain information on client requirements
Present findings and recommendations to management

title: Accountants and Auditors
description: Examine, analyze, and interpret accounting records to prepare financial statements, give advice, or audit and evaluate statements prepared by others.

tasks.name: Prepare, examine, or analyze accounting records and financial statements
Report to management regarding the finances of establishment
Establish tables of accounts and assign entries to proper accounts
Develop, maintain, and analyze budgets
Advise management about issues such as resource utilization and tax strategies
Analyze business operations, trends, costs, revenues, and financial commitments
Survey operations to ascertain accounting needs
Conduct or coordinate audits of company accounts

title: Financial Analysts
description: Conduct quantitative analyses of information affecting investment programs of public or private institutions.

tasks.name: Analyze financial information to produce forecasts of business or industry conditions
Interpret data affecting investment programs
Identify trends in financial data
Prepare plans of action for investment using financial analyses
Present oral and written reports on general economic trends
Maintain knowledge and stay abreast of developments in the fields of industrial technology
Collaborate with investment advisors to recommend investment strategies
Monitor developments in the fields they specialize in

title: Marketing Managers
description: Plan, direct, or coordinate marketing policies and programs to generate interest in products or services.

tasks.name: Identify, develop, or evaluate marketing strategy
Evaluate the financial aspects of product development
Direct the hiring, training, or performance evaluations of marketing staff
Coordinate or participate in promotional activities or trade shows
Initiate market research studies and analyze findings
Consult with product development personnel
Negotiate contracts with vendors or distributors
Compile lists describing product or service offerings
Use sales forecasting data to ensure sale of products

title: Market Research Analysts
description: Research conditions in local, regional, national, or online markets to examine potential sales of a product or service.

tasks.name: Collect and analyze data on customer demographics and preferences
Prepare reports of findings, illustrating data graphically
Gather data on competitors and analyze their prices, sales, and methods
Monitor industry statistics and follow trends in trade literature
Devise and evaluate methods and procedures for collecting data
Forecast and track marketing and sales trends, analyzing collected data
Measure and assess customer and employee satisfaction

title: Sales Managers
description: Plan, direct, or coordinate the actual distribution or movement of a product or service to the customer.

tasks.name: Direct and coordinate activities involving sales of manufactured products
Resolve customer complaints regarding sales and service
Review operational records and reports to project sales
Direct, coordinate, and review activities in sales and service accounting
Monitor customer preferences to determine focus of sales efforts
Advise dealers and distributors on policies and operating procedures
Confer or consult with department heads to plan advertising services
Prepare budgets and approve budget expenditures

title: Human Resources Specialists
description: Recruit, screen, interview, or place individuals within an organization. Perform duties in the areas of compensation, benefits, and job analysis.

tasks.name: Interpret and explain human resources policies, procedures, laws, and standards
Hire employees and process hiring-related paperwork
Inform job applicants of duties and responsibilities
Address employee relations issues, such as harassment allegations
Schedule or conduct new employee orientations
Maintain current knowledge of Equal Employment Opportunity laws
Conduct exit interviews and ensure procedures are followed
Analyze employment-related data and prepare required reports

title: Training and Development Specialists
description: Design or conduct work-related training and development programs to improve individual skills or organizational performance.

tasks.name: Assess training needs through surveys, interviews, or consultation
Develop alternative training methods if expected improvements are not seen
Evaluate training materials prepared by instructors
Organize and develop training manuals and materials
Present information using a variety of instructional techniques
Monitor, evaluate, and record training activities or program effectiveness
Coordinate recruitment and placement of training program participants

title: Economists
description: Conduct research, prepare reports, or formulate plans to address economic problems related to the production and distribution of goods and services.

tasks.name: Study economic and statistical data in areas such as finance and labor
Provide advice and recommendations for policies and plans
Compile, analyze, and report data to explain economic phenomena
Develop economic guidelines and standards
Testify at regulatory or legislative hearings
Forecast production and consumption of renewable resources
Conduct research on economic issues and disseminate research findings

title: Social Science Research Assistants
description: Assist social scientists in laboratory, survey, and other social science research.

tasks.name: Compile information from sources such as administrative schedules
Collect data and information using methods such as interviews
Prepare tables, graphs, fact sheets, and written reports
Verify the accuracy and completeness of survey data
Track research participants

title: Broadcast Announcers and Newscasters
description: Announce or describe news, sports, weather, or other programming over radio or television.

tasks.name: Identify story ideas and gather and verify factual information
Interview and observe people and attend events to gather information
Write and broadcast news stories
Present and deliver news stories
Review and approve scripts and visual content

title: Editors
description: Plan, coordinate, or edit content of material for publication.

tasks.name: Plan the contents of publications according to editorial policies
Review, rewrite, or revise written material
Verify facts, dates, and statistics using standard reference sources
Allocate print space for story text, photos, and illustrations
Negotiate contracts with authors
Assign topics to writers and select manuscripts submitted for publication

title: Commercial and Industrial Designers
description: Develop and design manufactured products such as cars, home appliances, and children's toys.

tasks.name: Read publications and attend showings to understand the market
Design products that satisfy functional requirements with aesthetic appeal
Evaluate how well designs fulfill requirements
Prepare scale drawings or detailed plans
Confer with engineering, marketing, production, or sales departments
Present designs and design details to audiences

title: Graphic Designers
description: Design or create graphics to meet specific commercial or promotional needs.

tasks.name: Create designs, concepts, and sample layouts for print and digital media
Develop graphics and layouts for product illustrations
Determine size and arrangement of illustrative material and copy
Confer with clients to discuss and determine layout design
Prepare illustrations or rough sketches of material
Review final layouts and suggest improvements if required
Use computer software to generate new images

title: Data Scientists
description: Develop and implement a set of techniques or analytics applications to transform raw data into meaningful information.

tasks.name: Analyze data using statistical techniques
Build predictive models and machine-learning algorithms
Clean and preprocess raw data for analysis
Visualize data and communicate insights to stakeholders
Collaborate with engineering teams to deploy models to production
Define metrics and monitor model performance over time
Write documentation and reports for data science projects
Conduct A/B experiments and analyze results

title: Database Administrators
description: Administer, test, and implement computer databases, applying knowledge of database management systems.

tasks.name: Test programs or databases, correct errors, and make necessary modifications
Plan, coordinate, and implement security measures for databases
Develop standards and guidelines to guide the use and acquisition of software
Identify, evaluate, and resolve database performance issues
Train users and answer questions
Approve, schedule, plan, and supervise installation and testing of databases
Backup and restore databases to ensure data integrity

title: Computer Network Architects
description: Design and implement computer and information networks, such as local area networks (LAN), wide area networks (WAN), intranets, extranets, and other data communications networks.

tasks.name: Design and implement new solutions and improving resilience of the current environment
Develop and implement policies and procedures for network and infrastructure management
Communicate with management to understand and address their needs
Assess the need for any system reconfigurations
Monitor network performance and troubleshoot network problems
Configure network hardware (firewalls, routers, switches)

title: Information Security Analysts
description: Plan, implement, upgrade, or monitor security measures for the protection of computer networks and information.

tasks.name: Monitor networks for security breaches and investigate when a breach occurs
Encrypt data transmissions and erect firewalls to conceal confidential information
Develop security standards and best practices
Conduct penetration testing
Advise management on security issues and improvements
Prepare security reports detailing security breaches and the extent of damage
Train staff on information security best practices

title: Computer User Support Specialists
description: Provide technical assistance to computer users. Answer questions or resolve computer problems for clients in person, or via telephone or electronically.

tasks.name: Read technical manuals and troubleshoot programs and equipment
Provide assistance to users troubleshooting hardware and software problems
Enter commands and observe system functioning to verify correct operations
Install and perform minor repairs on hardware and software
Develop training materials and procedures for staff
Maintain records of daily communications and problems solved

title: Compliance Officers
description: Examine, evaluate, and investigate eligibility for or conformity with laws and regulations governing contract compliance.

tasks.name: Prepare management reports regarding compliance operations and progress
Verify that software technology is in place to adequately provide oversight
Conduct or direct the internal investigation of compliance issues
Advise management on compliance with laws and regulations
Identify compliance issues that require follow-up or investigation
Provide employee training on compliance-related topics
Review and modify compliance procedures to ensure continual compliance

title: Logisticians
description: Analyze and coordinate the logistical functions of a firm or organization.

tasks.name: Maintain and develop positive business relationships with suppliers
Develop an understanding of customers' needs and take actions to ensure they are met
Direct availability and deployment of materials and supplies
Review logistics performance with suppliers against targets and benchmarks
Redesign the supply chain for maximum efficiency
Collaborate with other departments to integrate logistics with business systems

title: General and Operations Managers
description: Plan, direct, or coordinate the operations of public or private sector organizations.

tasks.name: Review financial statements, sales and activity reports, and other data
Direct and coordinate activities of businesses or departments
Manage staff, preparing work schedules and assigning specific duties
Monitor businesses or departmental performance and take corrective action
Establish and implement policies and goals
Determine staffing requirements and organize recruitment programs

title: Financial Managers
description: Plan, direct, or coordinate accounting, investing, banking, insurance, securities, and other financial activities.

tasks.name: Prepare or direct preparation of financial statements, business activity reports, and financial position forecasts
Monitor financial activities and details, ensuring legal requirements are met
Advise management on short-term and long-term financial objectives
Develop internal control policies and procedures
Receive cash and checks and make deposits
Delegate authority for the receipt, disbursement, banking, and protection of funds

title: Lawyers
description: Represent clients in criminal and civil litigation and other legal proceedings, draw up legal documents, or manage or advise clients on legal transactions.

tasks.name: Advise clients concerning business transactions, claim liability, advisability of prosecuting or defending lawsuits
Represent clients in court or before government agencies
Examine legal data to determine advisability of defending or prosecuting lawsuit
Gather evidence to formulate defense or initiate legal actions
Interpret laws, rulings, and regulations for individuals and businesses
Present and summarize cases to judges and juries

title: Paralegals and Legal Assistants
description: Assist lawyers by investigating facts, preparing legal documents, or researching legal precedent.

tasks.name: Prepare legal documents, including briefs, pleadings, appeals, wills, and contracts
Gather and analyze research data, such as statutes, decisions, and legal articles
Investigate the facts and law of cases and search pertinent sources

Assist attorneys during trials by handling exhibits, taking notes, or reviewing trial transcripts

title: Registered Nurses
description: Assess patient health problems and needs, develop and implement nursing care plans, and maintain medical records.

tasks.name: Monitor, record, and report symptoms or changes in patients' conditions
Maintain accurate, detailed reports and records

Instruct patients and family members in proper care

title: Pharmacists
description: Dispense drugs prescribed by physicians and other health practitioners and provide information to patients about medications.

tasks.name: Review prescriptions to assure accuracy and determine formulas and ingredients needed
Provide information and advice regarding drug interactions and side effects
Compound and dispense medications as prescribed by doctors
Manage pharmacy staff and train pharmacy students

title: Postsecondary Teachers
description: Teach courses in their subject area to students at universities, junior colleges, and other postsecondary institutions.

tasks.name: Prepare and deliver lectures to undergraduate or graduate students
Evaluate and grade students' class work, assignments, and papers
Conduct research in a particular field of knowledge
Keep abreast of developments in one's field by reading publications
Write grant proposals to procure external research funding
Collaborate with colleagues on research projects
Advise students on academic and vocational curricula
Serve on academic or administrative committees that deal with institutional policies

title: Elementary School Teachers
description: Teach academic and social skills to students in public or private schools at the kindergarten through elementary school level.

tasks.name: Instruct students in academic subjects using a variety of techniques
Observe and evaluate students' performance and social development
Prepare and adapt materials and classroom resources
Communicate with parents or guardians about their children's progress

title: Chief Executives

tasks.name: Confer with board members, organization officials, and staff to discuss operations
Direct or coordinate an organization's financial or budget activities
Appoint department heads and managers and assign or delegate responsibilities to them

title: Business Operations Specialists

tasks.name: Analyze operational processes and prepare reports to maximize use of resources

title: Computer Hardware Engineers

tasks.name: Analyze information to determine, recommend, and plan layout, selection of components, or systems

Monitor functioning of equipment to ensure system operates in conformance

title: Network and Computer Systems Administrators
description: Install, configure, and maintain an organization's local area network (LAN), wide area network (WAN), and Internet systems or a segment of a network system.

tasks.name: Maintain and administer computer networks and related computing environments

title: Advertising and Promotions Managers
description: Plan, direct, or coordinate advertising policies and programs or produce collateral materials, such as posters, contests, coupons, or giveaways.

tasks.name: Plan and prepare advertising and promotional material for products or services
Confer with clients to provide marketing advice or to understand advertising needs
Direct, motivate, and monitor the mobilization of campaign teams

title: Public Relations and Fundraising Managers
description: Plan, direct, or coordinate activities designed to create or maintain a favorable public image for their employer or client.

tasks.name: Respond to requests for information from the media or designate appropriate spokesperson
Establish and maintain effective working relationships with clients and audiences

Draft speeches and arrange for their delivery

tasks.name: Interview prospective clients to obtain data about their financial resources and insurance needs
Explain features, advantages, and disadvantages of various policies

tasks.name: Contact prospective clients to present information about available financial products

tasks.name: Operate computers to record, store, and analyze information

Consult with clients to determine functional and spatial requirements of new structures

tasks.name: Respond to requests for information from the media and designate a spokesperson

tasks.name: Apply mathematical theories and formulas to teach or solve problems in a business environment
Analyze and interpret statistical data to identify significant differences in relationships among sources

description: Sell goods for wholesalers or manufacturers to businesses or groups of individuals. Work requires substantial knowledge of items sold.

tasks.name: Analyze organic or inorganic compounds to determine chemical or physical properties

tasks.name: Prepare and deliver lectures and discussions
